title: March 20
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 20''' is the 79th day of the year (80th in leap years). There are 286 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1970]] – [[Andrew Kishino]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Jonathan Lipow]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 84|''Star Wars'' (1977) 84]] published.
*[[1988]] – [[Myrna Velasco]] is born.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Star Wars: Anakin's Speedway]]'' released.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 40|''Star Wars'' (1998) 40]] published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars Tales 11]]'' published.
*2002 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 12|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 12]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Masquerade (online adventure)|''Masquerade'']] published on [[Wizards of the Coast]] website.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' [[The Clone Wars: Season One|season one]] ends with "[[Hostage Crisis]]" on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – [[Legacy (2013) 1|''Legacy'' (2013) 1]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 63|''Star Wars'' (2015) 63]] published.
*2019 – [[Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation 6|''Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation'' 6]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Insider 188|''Star Wars Insider'' 188]] published.
*2019 – The merger between [[The Walt Disney Company]] and [[20th Century Studios|20th Century Fox]] is completed.
*2019 – [[LucasArts]] is revived under its second-to-last title "Lucasfilm Games".
*[[2020]] – "[[Gone with a Trace]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – "[[Leia Organa - A Princess, A General, A Mentor]]" is uploaded to YouTube.
*[[2023]] – [[Paul Grant]] dies.
*2023 – [[Michael Reaves]] dies.
*[[2024]] – "[[Bad Territory]]" airs on Disney+.
*2024 – [[Jango Fett 1|''Jango Fett'' 1]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic (2023) 5|''The High Republic'' (2023) 5]] published.
*2024 – [[Thrawn: Alliances 3|''Thrawn: Alliances'' 3]] published.
*2024 – [[Visions – Takashi Okazaki 1|''Visions – Takashi Okazaki'' 1]] published.
*2024 – [[Dianne Crittenden]] dies.
<noinclude>
